<!-- Peblla Marketing Team Knowledge Base — Auto-generated from group chat learnings -->

# Marketing Kit Workflow

## Product Specifications

| Product | Size | Purpose |
|---------|------|---------|
| **Postcard** | 4in x 6in | First order promotion; placed at restaurant front counter for customers to take |
| **Poster** | 24in x 36in | Posted on store walls/windows |

## Print Combos (Customer Selects in CIF Form)

| Combo | Contents |
|-------|----------|
| **Combo 1** | 1x 24x36 poster + 500x 4x6 postcards |
| **Combo 2** | 1x 24x36 window vinyl + 100x 4x6 postcards |

## Full Workflow

1. Restaurant fills out **Pre-Onboarding Marketing Form** during onboarding:
   https://form-link.peblla.com/form/#/pre-onboarding-marketing-form
2. Amanda checks the **CIF form** in Peblla backend portal for:
   - Promotion content
   - Store name, address, contact info
   - Print quantity / combo selection
3. Design team creates Marketing Kit (postcard + poster/vinyl)
4. Print order placed via VistaPrint
5. VistaPrint ships directly to the restaurant

## Design Standards

### Asset Sourcing

| Asset | Source |
|-------|--------|
| Product photos, logo, colors | Restaurant's website or online ordering page (`{brand}.peblla.com`) |
| QR Code | Provided by Amanda |
| Promotion content | CIF form data |

### Color Palette

- Derived from the restaurant's brand colors
- Reference the restaurant's website for overall style (background, fonts, color tone)

### Food Photography

- Must be related to the specific restaurant's actual menu items
- Reference the restaurant's online ordering interface for dish images

### Orientation (Permanent — Amanda Zhu)

**Always vertical (portrait)** — both 4x6 postcards and 24x36 posters. Never horizontal.

### No Horizontal Business Cards (Permanent — Amanda Zhu, 2026-03-27)

Marketing Kit only includes 4x6 Postcard + 24x36 Poster. Do not produce horizontal business-card-format promotional cards.

### Information Density (Permanent — Amanda Zhu Training)

The design must not contain only one promotional message. Fill the canvas with marketing-value copy. Reference HH Tea example:
- "First Order X% OFF"
- "Free Delivery"
- "Download our APP"
- "Order @ website-URL"
- "GET APP" pointing to QR code

### QR Code Size

- On 4x6 postcards: QR must be **at least 1.2 inches** (360px at 300dpi)
- Must be scannable by phone in real-world printed size

### Powered by Peblla

- Small placement in bottom-right corner
- Must not dominate the design (Amanda-confirmed style)

### File Requirements

- VistaPrint accepts **PDF and PNG**
- No strict requirement for crop marks or safe zones

### Design Tools

- Canva or Figma (Amanda's recommendation)
- Python + Pillow / HTML generation for print-quality files is also acceptable

## Example Reference

`shared/marketing-kit-examples/HH tea - Baltimore, MD/`

Contains:
- 4x6 postcard
- 24x36 poster
- Maps thumbnail

## Task Management

- ClickUp Marketing Kit list tracks all tasks
- Task status flow: `waiting for operation CN` → `printing` → `done`

## Team Division

| Person | Responsibility |
|--------|---------------|
| Amanda | CIF form review, QR code provision, VistaPrint ordering |
| Momo / Sigma | Design and production |
| 孙玉军 | Visual design (domestic designer) |

## Future Goal

Sigma will gradually take over Amanda's full marketing kit workflow, including viewing ClickUp task details.
